title: Climate Science Research Programme (CSRP) evaluation: summary report
body: "The Department for Energy Security and Net Zero (DESNZ) commissioned RSM UK Consulting, alongside Science Metrix, Overton, and academics from UCL and Imperial College London, to evaluate the Climate Science Research Programme (CSRP). Managed by the Science and Innovation for Climate and Energy (SICE) Directorate, CSRP funds interdisciplinary climate science research to inform UK policy, support emissions reporting, and strengthen international leadership.   "
